title: If I help you, then you'll help me
bodyText:
BUSINESS NEWS - BNI, an international networking organisation specialising in business referrals among members, is holding a visitors' day on Friday 12 April for its George Chapter. BNI is a great way for businesses to experience growth by maximising marketing efforts through word of mouth.


> The organisation generated over 15 million referrals for members in 2023 alone. In South Africa, BNI members generated over R800-million worth of business for fellow members.


BNI was founded in 1985 by acclaimed business author Dr Ivan Misner. His books include Masters of Networking, Masters of Success, Masters of Sales, Truth or Delusion, The 29% Solution, Networking Like a Pro, Money on the Table, and Business Networking &Sex (not what you think). "Our style of networking is based on the philosophy Givers Gain®. If I help you, then you'll help me, and we'll all do better business," says Misner.


> The visitors' day is on Friday 12 April at 07:30 at the George Golf Club and all business owners are welcome.


WhatsApp your name and business name to 082 657 4539 for more information and visit www.bnisoutherncape.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
